taxonomy: Meoschium aristatum is classified within the family Boraginaceae. This family includes plants commonly known as borage or forget-me-nots. The Boraginaceae family is a part of the larger group known as asterids, which is a clade of flowering plants. Asterids are further divided into two subclades, including the euasterids I and II.
